demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My neck is so incredibly painful I can barely swallow, the pain shoots right up into my ears, and my heart won't stop racing.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain in the front of my neck has been getting worse for days, I've got a high fever, it hurts too much to drink, and my heart keeps pounding — I couldn't wait until the morning.

symptom_narrative.onset: the neck pain started about five days ago and has been escalating; I had a bad cold about three weeks ago
symptom_narrative.duration: five days of worsening pain; the racing heart and shakiness came on over the last couple of days
symptom_narrative.character: severe, exquisite, focal pain over the front of my neck — it feels raw and tender to the lightest touch
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: about the worst pain I've had — I'm holding my neck completely still because any movement is agony
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the front of my neck, near my voice box, and it shoots up into my jaw, ears and the back of my head on both sides
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, there all the time and getting worse
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — regular paracetamol and ibuprofen haven't touched it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: swallowing and turning my head make it much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a high fever, drenching sweats, feeling wiped out and unwell all over, my heart racing and pounding, feeling hot all the time, and a fine shake in my hands
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed, I can hardly move my neck, and it hurts so much to swallow that I'm barely drinking

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; too painful to swallow so has been drinking very little today

objective_data_offered.value: a fever of 38.6 degrees on my home thermometer
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: my smartwatch keeps showing my heart rate around 115
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: consumer wearable, not a medical-grade monitor

objective_data_offered.value: holding the neck rigidly still, visibly sweaty and unwell, a fine tremor of the outstretched hands on video
